videos.headline: Vanderbilt fans storm field after historic win over Alabama
videos.description: Vanderbilt hangs on for its first-ever win over a No. 1 ranked team in a thrilling 40-35 victory over Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vanderbilt fans storm field after historic win over Alabama) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vanderbilt marches down the field on Alabama for an opening drive TD
videos.description: Sedrick Alexander barrels into the end zone to give Vanderbilt a 7-0 lead over Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vanderbilt marches down the field on Alabama for an opening drive TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vanderbilt goes up 13-0 on Alabama with pick-six
videos.description: Randon Fontenette hauls in a tipped pass and returns it for a Commodores touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vanderbilt goes up 13-0 on Alabama with pick-six) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jam Miller gets into the end zone for Alabama
videos.description: Jam Miller rushes for an 8-yard touchdown to get Alabama on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jam Miller gets into the end zone for Alabama) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jam Miller's rushing TD pulls Alabama closer
videos.description: Jam Miller walks into the end zone to cut into Vanderbilt's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jam Miller’s rushing TD pulls Alabama closer) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jalen Milroe scores on QB keeper
videos.description: Jalen Milroe keeps it for a 47-yard rushing touchdown to cut into the Vanderbilt's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalen Milroe scores on QB keeper) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Diego Pavia connects with Junior Sherrill on a 4th-and-1 for a Vandy TD
videos.description: Diego Pavia throws it up to Junior Sherrill who comes down with the ball to extend Vanderbilt's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Diego Pavia connects with Junior Sherrill on a 4th-and-1 for a Vandy TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ryan Williams elevates for unreal Alabama TD
videos.description: Jalen Milroe throws it up the sideline to Ryan Williams, who comes down with ball, stays inbounds, then scores a touchdown for Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ryan Williams elevates for unreal Alabama TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vanderbilt comes up with the ball after strip sack of Jalen Milroe
videos.description: Miles Capers sacks Jalen Milroe causing him to fumble the ball and Yilanan Ouattara recovers it for Vanderbilt.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vanderbilt comes up with the ball after strip sack of Jalen Milroe) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kamrean Johnson's TD extends Vanderbilt's late lead vs. Bama
videos.description: Diego Pavia dumps the ball off to Kamrean Johnson, who scores easily to give Vanderbilt a 40-28 lead over Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kamrean Johnson's TD extends Vanderbilt’s late lead vs. Bama) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ryan Williams scores on a reverse to pull Alabama within 5 points
videos.description: Jalen Milroe flips the ball to Ryan Williams, who beats the Vanderbilt defense to the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ryan Williams scores on a reverse to pull Alabama within 5 points) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Diego Pavia gives electric postgame interview after Vandy's stunning upset of Alabama
videos.description: Diego Pavia credits his teammates for Vanderbilt's historic upset of Alabama before getting mobbed by his family on the field.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Diego Pavia gives electric postgame interview after Vandy's stunning upset of Alabama) 2024/10/5

videos.headline: Vandy fans parade goalpost down Broadway, toss it in river
videos.description: Vanderbilt students march the goalpost down Broadway in Nashville, before throwing it in the Cumberland River to celebrate the school's upset over No. 1 Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Misc. (Vandy fans parade goalpost down Broadway, toss it in river) 2024/10/5 3PV
